message:
test(selection): add safety tests for --no-deps warning, determinism, and legacy flags

Adds 7 new selection safety tests per mjt.6.2 requirements:

NO-DEPS WARNING:
  - test_no_deps_prints_warning: Validates that --no-deps prints a
    prominent warning about incomplete installations

PLAN DETERMINISM:
  - test_plan_is_deterministic: Verifies that running selection twice
    with the same inputs produces identical plan output
  - test_plan_does_not_mutate_state: Verifies that acfs_resolve_selection
    is idempotent and can be called multiple times safely

LEGACY FLAG MAPPING (mjt.5.5):
  - test_legacy_skip_postgres: --skip-postgres maps to db.postgres18
  - test_legacy_skip_vault: --skip-vault maps to tools.vault
  - test_legacy_skip_cloud: --skip-cloud maps to cloud.wrangler,
    cloud.supabase, cloud.vercel
  - test_legacy_flags_affect_selection: Legacy flags integrate with
    the selection engine and affect should_run_module results

These tests encode the "golden path" examples from mjt.1.2 to prevent
spec/docs drift as the selection logic evolves.

Test count: 21 → 28 (all passing)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.5.8","title":"Integrate manifest-driven execution with resume/state + error reporting","description":"## Goal
Ensure the new manifest-driven execution path *improves* reliability rather than regressing it.

## Why this matters
Multiple open reliability epics are upgrading `install.sh` with:
- resume/state persistence
- phase wrappers
- structured error reporting
- checksum recovery + skip tracking

If we refactor `install.sh` without explicitly integrating those systems, we risk shipping a “clean architecture” that is worse for beginners (harder to recover from failures).

## Scope
- The orchestrator remains the owner of:
  - state.json persistence
  - phase framing (`run_phase`)
  - step-level error context (`try_step` / `report_failure`)
  - skip tracking + end-of-install reporting
- Generated module functions remain simple:
  - validate contract at entry
  - run their install/verify logic
  - return status (optional modules may degrade gracefully)

## Integration requirements
- Wrap category/phase entrypoints with `run_phase` (or equivalent).
- Wrap module invocations as `try_step "module:<id>" install_<...>` so failures point to the exact module.
- Record module outcomes in state:
  - failed module id
  - completed module ids (preferred for deep resume)
  - skipped module/tool reasons (checksum mismatch, network error after retries, optional failure, etc.)
- Ensure `--print-plan` and `--list-modules` do not mutate state.

## Acceptance criteria
- A failed module clearly reports:
  - phase
  - module id
  - suggested fix (via ERROR_PATTERNS if available)
- Skipped tools/modules surface as “intentionally skipped” (not “missing”) in:
  - end-of-install summary (`agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-8z5`)
  - doctor output (`agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-qup`)
- Resume behavior does not regress after refactor.

## Notes
This task is intentionally blocked by the core reliability primitives so we integrate once, not twice.

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.6","title":"Phase 5: Testing + CI for manifest-driven installs","description":"## Purpose
Make the refactor safe by adding targeted tests that prevent regressions.

## Test requirements
- Offline curl|bash bootstrap simulation test
- Selection safety tests (dependency closure, skip-dep failure)
- Existing Docker integration tests remain passing
- CI drift check for generated scripts

## Acceptance criteria
- CI fails if generated outputs drift from manifest.
- CI exercises the curl|bash bootstrap code path without network.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-21T13:47:14.513673-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T13:47:14.513673-05:00","labels":["ci","installer","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.6","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-21T13:47:14.514034-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.6","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T13:47:15.419049-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.6.1","title":"Add offline curl|bash bootstrap simulation test","description":"## Goal
Prevent regressions in the `curl|bash` bootstrap code path (especially after future refactors).

## Requirements
- Test runs with **no network** by simulating `SCRIPT_DIR=""` while using a **local archive copy**.
- Validate the happy path:
  - bootstrap chooses the archive path
  - extraction succeeds
  - `bash -n` validation runs on sourced scripts
  - sourcing libs + generated scripts works
  - coherence check passes (`acfs.manifest.yaml` matches `ACFS_MANIFEST_SHA256`)

Nice-to-have negative coverage (if cheap):
- Break coherence (e.g., swap manifest file) and ensure bootstrap aborts with “bootstrap mismatch”.

## Acceptance criteria
- CI runs this test on every push.
- Failures are crisp and point at bootstrap validation (not later in the install).

-{"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.6.2","title":"Add selection safety tests (--only deps closure, --skip dep failure)","description":"## Goal
Ensure selection logic is predictable, safe, and remains stable as modules evolve.

## Required coverage
- `--only <module>` expands dependencies by default (plan includes deps before the target where needed).
- `--no-deps` disables closure and prints a prominent warning.
- `--skip <dep>` that breaks a required dependency fails early with an actionable error.

## Recommended extra coverage (cheap, prevents footguns)
- Unknown module id in `--only/--skip` fails fast.
- Unknown phase in `--only-phase` fails fast.
- `--print-plan` output is deterministic (stable ordering) and does not mutate state.
- Legacy flags (e.g., `--skip-vault`) map into the same selection engine (at least one golden test).

## Acceptance criteria
- Tests encode the “golden path” examples from `mjt.1.2` so docs/spec can’t drift.

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.6.3","title":"Update CI workflows for manifest sync + bootstrap simulation","description":"## Goal
Make drift and bootstrap regressions impossible to merge.

## Requirements
- Drift enforcement:
  - CI runs generator and fails if `scripts/generated/**` differs from what the manifest produces.
  - Prefer using generator `--validate/--diff` workflows once available.

- Shell safety checks:
  - `bash -n` on sourced scripts (libs + generated).
  - ShellCheck on installer scripts (where applicable).

- Installer path coverage:
  - Run the offline `curl|bash` bootstrap simulation test (`mjt.6.1`).
  - Run selection safety tests (`mjt.6.2`).

## Acceptance criteria
- CI blocks merges on any drift, syntax error, or bootstrap regression.
- Bootstrap simulation runs without network so it’s reliable in CI.

 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.7","title":"Phase 6: Documentation + maintainer workflow","description":"## Purpose
Document the *new* contract so future changes don’t reintroduce drift.

## Scope
- Update README in existing sections (no new “contributing” content).
- Add an internal maintainer guide for adding/updating modules safely.
- Update wizard/docs to prefer tagged releases for curl|bash installs.

## Acceptance criteria
- Docs match reality (no “two universes”).
- Internal-only posture preserved.
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-21T13:47:14.682393-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-21T13:47:14.682393-05:00","labels":["docs","installer","manifest"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.7","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-21T13:47:14.682737-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.7","depends_on_id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T13:47:15.564642-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"agentic_coding_flywheel_setup-mjt.7.1","title":"Update user docs for new selection + curl|bash ref pinning","description":"## Goal
Make user-facing documentation match the new reality.

## Requirements
- Document:
  - prefer tagged releases for curl|bash installs
  - `--only/--skip/--print-plan` behavior
- Integrate into existing README sections (no new contributor language)

## Related
- Coordinate with existing README umbrella issue(s).

@@ -265,6 +265,22 @@ test_no_deps_excludes_dependencies() {
     test_fail "$name"
 }
 
+test_no_deps_prints_warning() {
+    local name="--no-deps prints prominent warning"
+    reset_selection
+    ONLY_MODULES=("agents.claude")
+    NO_DEPS=true
+
+    # Capture stderr to check for warning
+    local output
+    output=$(acfs_resolve_selection 2>&1)
+    if [[ "$output" == *"WARNING"* ]] && [[ "$output" == *"no-deps"* || "$output" == *"dependency"* ]]; then
+        test_pass "$name"
+    else
+        test_fail "$name" "Expected warning about --no-deps"
+    fi
+}
+
 # ============================================================
 # Test Cases: Effective Plan Arrays
 # ============================================================
@@ -360,6 +376,148 @@ test_plan_respects_dependency_order() {
     test_fail "$name"
 }
 
+# ============================================================
+# Test Cases: Plan Determinism (--print-plan stability)
+# ============================================================
+
+test_plan_is_deterministic() {
+    local name="Plan output is deterministic (stable across calls)"
+    reset_selection
+    ONLY_MODULES=("stack.mcp_agent_mail")
+
+    # Run selection twice
+    local plan1 plan2
+    if acfs_resolve_selection 2>/dev/null; then
+        plan1="${ACFS_EFFECTIVE_PLAN[*]}"
+    else
+        test_fail "$name" "First selection failed"
+        return
+    fi
+
+    reset_selection
+    ONLY_MODULES=("stack.mcp_agent_mail")
+    if acfs_resolve_selection 2>/dev/null; then
+        plan2="${ACFS_EFFECTIVE_PLAN[*]}"
+    else
+        test_fail "$name" "Second selection failed"
+        return
+    fi
+
+    if [[ "$plan1" == "$plan2" ]]; then
+        test_pass "$name"
+    else
+        test_fail "$name" "Plans differ: '$plan1' vs '$plan2'"
+    fi
+}
+
+test_plan_does_not_mutate_state() {
+    local name="Selection does not mutate global state (idempotent)"
+    reset_selection
+    ONLY_MODULES=("lang.bun")
+
+    # Run once
+    acfs_resolve_selection 2>/dev/null || true
+    local count1="${#ACFS_EFFECTIVE_PLAN[@]}"
+
+    # Run again without reset - should produce same result
+    acfs_resolve_selection 2>/dev/null || true
+    local count2="${#ACFS_EFFECTIVE_PLAN[@]}"
+
+    if [[ "$count1" == "$count2" ]]; then
+        test_pass "$name"
+    else
+        test_fail "$name" "Plan counts differ: $count1 vs $count2"
+    fi
+}
+
+# ============================================================
+# Test Cases: Legacy Flag Mapping (mjt.5.5)
+# ============================================================
+
+test_legacy_skip_postgres() {
+    local name="--skip-postgres maps to SKIP_MODULES"
+    reset_selection
+    SKIP_POSTGRES=true
+
+    acfs_apply_legacy_skips
+
+    local found=false
+    for module in "${SKIP_MODULES[@]}"; do
+        if [[ "$module" == "db.postgres18" ]]; then
+            found=true
+            break
+        fi
+    done
+
+    if [[ "$found" == "true" ]]; then
+        test_pass "$name"
+    else
+        test_fail "$name" "db.postgres18 not in SKIP_MODULES"
+    fi
+}
+
+test_legacy_skip_vault() {
+    local name="--skip-vault maps to SKIP_MODULES"
+    reset_selection
+    SKIP_VAULT=true
+
+    acfs_apply_legacy_skips
+
+    local found=false
+    for module in "${SKIP_MODULES[@]}"; do
+        if [[ "$module" == "tools.vault" ]]; then
+            found=true
+            break
+        fi
+    done
+
+    if [[ "$found" == "true" ]]; then
+        test_pass "$name"
+    else
+        test_fail "$name" "tools.vault not in SKIP_MODULES"
+    fi
+}
+
+test_legacy_skip_cloud() {
+    local name="--skip-cloud maps to multiple cloud modules"
+    reset_selection
+    SKIP_CLOUD=true
+
+    acfs_apply_legacy_skips
+
+    local found_wrangler=false found_supabase=false found_vercel=false
+    for module in "${SKIP_MODULES[@]}"; do
+        case "$module" in
+            "cloud.wrangler") found_wrangler=true ;;
+            "cloud.supabase") found_supabase=true ;;
+            "cloud.vercel") found_vercel=true ;;
+        esac
+    done
+
+    if [[ "$found_wrangler" == "true" && "$found_supabase" == "true" && "$found_vercel" == "true" ]]; then
+        test_pass "$name"
+    else
+        test_fail "$name" "Missing cloud modules in SKIP_MODULES"
+    fi
+}
+
+test_legacy_flags_affect_selection() {
+    local name="Legacy flags integrate with selection engine"
+    reset_selection
+    SKIP_VAULT=true
+
+    acfs_apply_legacy_skips
+
+    if acfs_resolve_selection 2>/dev/null; then
+        # tools.vault should be excluded
+        if ! should_run_module "tools.vault"; then
+            test_pass "$name"
+            return
+        fi
+    fi
+    test_fail "$name" "tools.vault should be excluded by legacy flag"
+}
+
 # ============================================================
 # Test Cases: should_run_module Helper
 # ============================================================
@@ -422,6 +580,7 @@ test_skip_unknown_module_fails
 
 # --no-deps tests
 test_no_deps_excludes_dependencies
+test_no_deps_prints_warning
 
 # Effective plan tests
 test_effective_plan_populated
@@ -432,6 +591,16 @@ test_exclude_reason_tracked
 # Plan order tests
 test_plan_respects_dependency_order
 
+# Plan determinism tests (--print-plan stability)
+test_plan_is_deterministic
+test_plan_does_not_mutate_state
+
+# Legacy flag mapping tests (mjt.5.5)
+test_legacy_skip_postgres
+test_legacy_skip_vault
+test_legacy_skip_cloud
+test_legacy_flags_affect_selection
+
 # should_run_module tests
 test_should_run_module_true
 test_should_run_module_false
